# jamfschool_refresh_device (Action)

Schedules a full inventory refresh for a device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Refresh a device's inventory, clearing any installation errors.
action "jamfschool_refresh_device" "refresh_inventory" {
  config {
    serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
    clear_errors  = true
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `clear_errors` (Boolean) Clear all installation failures so apps get reinstalled when previously failed.
- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
